stemHtml: Some tuboprop aircraft use a mechanical torquemeter system which uses a gearbox with helical gears. Regarding its measurement, torque is defined as the product of the applied force and...

options.a: the rate at which the force is applied.
options.c: the angle between the force and the helical gear teeth.
options.d: the distance perpendicular from the axis of rotation to the line of action of the force.
